mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT i.inquiry_number, i.inquiry_title, u.user_nickname, i.answer_status FROM ddd_inquiry i JOIN ddd_user u ON i.user_number = u.user_number ORDER BY i.answer_status ASC) WHERE rownum <= 5
SELECT count(*) FROM DDD_INQUIRY WHERE ANSWER_STATUS = 'N'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT i.inquiry_number, i.answer_status, i.inquiry_title, u.user_nickname, i.inquiry_date FROM ddd_inquiry i JOIN ddd_user u ON i.user_number = u.user_number WHERE i.answer_status = 'N' ORDER BY i.inquiry_date ASC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT i.inquiry_title, i.answer_status, u.user_nickname, i.inquiry_date, i.inquiry_number, i.inquiry_post, i.answer_date, i.answer_post FROM ddd_inquiry i JOIN ddd_user u ON i.user_number = u.user_number WHERE i.inquiry_number = #{inquiryNumber}
